commands.summary: P4 revision boundary tests passed for PlaybackRevisionMismatch, GraphSnapshotMismatch, GenerationStampMismatch, and successful commit.

tests_covered: Successful P4 transition increments PlaybackRevision owned by P4 adapter
allowed_operations_checked: P4 adapter owns P4 command identity and PlaybackRevision commit result
P7-owned GraphSnapshotRevision and GenerationStamp are passed as observed/expected values only
forbidden_operations_checked: P4 adapter does not query a P7 GenerationTupleRegistry
P4 adapter does not validate full GenerationTuple internals
GraphSnapshotRevision was not renamed to PlaybackGraphRevision
